title: pectis glaucescens
intro: Pectis glaucescens, also known as Mexican dune burr-sage, is a shrub native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pectis glaucescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even help with wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pectis glaucescens is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
